# This is a test

hello

```{python}
import plotly.express as px
import random

n = random.randint(1000, 9999)
x = [random.uniform(0, 10) for _ in range(20)]
y = [random.uniform(0, 10) for _ in range(20)]

fig = px.scatter(x=x, y=y, title=f"Scatter #{n}")
fig.show()
```

```{python}
print('hello world')
print(1 + 2)
print('goodbye friend')
```
